description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a streamlined, elongated body and a long, narrow tail. The plumage is predominantly dark, with subtle gradients of blue-black and gray along the body, and a lighter, almost brownish hue on the beak and tail feathers. The beak is slender and slightly pointed, suitable for probing or picking. The legs and feet are visible at the rear, appearing pale and somewhat scaly, with a naturalistic texture. The wings are folded tightly against the body, giving the bird a sleek, aerodynamic profile. The overall form and coloration suggest a bird adapted for urban environments, possibly seen perched or foraging in parks or streets.
description: A streamlined, dark-feathered bird with a long, narrow tail and slender pointed beak, featuring subtle blue-black and gray gradients and pale legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, streamlined profile, and long, narrow tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded back, tapered tail, and pale legs extending behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the beak and tail feathers.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed beak, rounded head, and symmetrical body tapering toward the tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid dark coloration with subtle gradients and slight iridescence on the body and wings
